metadata.description: Evidence-first AI playbooks for ecommerce operators — free to read, one prompt to run.

plugins.name: ecommerce-operator-os
plugins.description: 50 ecommerce operating playbooks as skills: which spend to kill, which channels make profit, what changed this week, can we trust the tracking, which flows leak revenue, which feed issues hurt sales, and more — each gathers evidence, applies numeric rules and vetoes, and returns a defensible call.
